phases.section: A — Init validation (baseline build as private_poc/web/standard)

tests.name: init_sh_non_interactive_exits_zero
tests.details: init.sh --non-interactive returned 0 with --git-host other and fake remote. Note: agent task instructions used '$GOV' shell variable that quoted '--gov-mode private_poc' as one token; init.sh correctly errored with 'Unknown option: --gov-mode private_poc'. Re-running with separate args succeeded.

tests.name: context7_detection
tests.details: verify-install.sh from $PROJECT_DIR reported 'Context7 MCP installed' and 'Context7 MCP configured'; 52 checks passed, 0 issues

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: From $FRAMEWORK, init.sh --non-interactive exited 1 with 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo.' (PR #18 U-N/U-O fix verified)

documentation_gaps.gap: scripts/process-checklist.sh --help omits --start-phase1 (it is a real action handled at line 45/1071 but not listed in the Commands help block)

phases.section: Baseline build (Phase 1 + Phase 2 init + 1 recorded feature)

tests.name: phase1_steps_completed
tests.details: All 5 PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) completed via process-checklist.sh

tests.name: phase2_init_verified
tests.details: After producing package-lock.json stub, --verify-init auto-marked 4/6 then manual --complete-step finished phase2_init at 7/7 with .verified=true

tests.name: build_loop_feature_recorded
tests.details: uat-feat-1: started feature, completed all 6 build_loop steps including feature_recorded; build-progress.json features_completed = ['uat-feat-1']

tests.name: feat_commit_after_loop_succeeds
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-feat-1): stub feature for UAT' succeeded after Build Loop completion

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances .current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: After completing all phase1_architecture steps, run scripts/check-phase-gate.sh; it reports 'Phase gates consistent' but .claude/phase-state.json .current_phase remains 0
framework_bugs.expected: Some script (check-phase-gate.sh or process-checklist.sh) should advance .current_phase from 0 to 1 (or 1 to 2) when its phase's required steps complete and gate passes
framework_bugs.actual: current_phase stayed at 0 throughout entire baseline build; no documented advancement command exists. Confirmation of still-open prior-sweep U-D bug.

phases.section: F — Upgrade flow (private_poc -> sponsored_poc via upgrade-project.sh)

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero
tests.details: bash $FRAMEWORK/scripts/upgrade-project.sh --to-sponsored-poc returned 0; output reports 'Current POC mode: private poc' (poc_mode read from phase-state.json — PR #17 U-E fix verified)

tests.name: process_state_preserved
tests.details: build-progress.json features_completed still contains 'uat-feat-1'; process-state.json build_loop reset (expected after feature_recorded auto-reset, BL-006 grace window)

tests.name: new_required_artifacts_listed
tests.details: Upgrade output lists files updated (.claude/phase-state.json, .claude/tool-preferences.json, CLAUDE.md, PROJECT_INTAKE.md) and post-upgrade hints (preflight gate, UAT migration). Adequate listing for sponsored_poc.

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json then ran upgrade-project.sh --to-production; exited 1 with '[FAIL] upgrade blocked — pending user decision.' (PR #17 U-F fix verified)

tests.name: upgrade_changelog_present_in_script
tests.details: $FRAMEWORK/scripts/upgrade-project.sh header contains explicit BL-006 (2026-04-24) and BL-015 (2026-04-25) changelog entries

tests.name: no_template_placeholders_in_output
tests.details: grep -E '__PROJECT_NAME__|__PLATFORM__|__LANGUAGE__|__TRACK__' on upgrade stdout returned no hits

tests.name: post_upgrade_helpers_refreshed
tests.details: Upgrade re-copied scripts/pending-approval.sh and scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh from framework (PR #17 U-H persistence on upgrade)

documentation_gaps.gap: Post-upgrade verification logged '[WARN] UAT platform unknown (intake-progress.json missing or lacks platform field)' even though init.sh recorded platform=web; intake-progress.json is not produced by --non-interactive init, leaving the UAT migration step always-warning on upgrades. Not severe (warn, not fail) but creates noise.
documentation_gaps.where: scripts/upgrade-project.sh post-upgrade UAT migration step / init.sh --non-interactive flow not creating .claude/intake-progress.json

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: git ls-files | xargs grep on password/api_key/secret/token matched only documentation strings (gitleaks references in CI workflow, .gitignore comment, validate.sh print statements). No real credentials.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — no FORCE/reset events occurred during this run; .claude/process-audit.log correctly absent

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD = d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (matches setup snapshot). git status --short shows only pre-existing untracked .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ dirs from prior gitStatus baseline.

summary: Baseline build (private_poc/web/standard) and upgrade to sponsored_poc both succeeded; PR #17 U-E/U-F/U-H fixes and PR #18 framework-self guard all verified. Only finding is U-D confirmation (no script advances current_phase) at Medium, which is the prior-sweep known-open bug.
